children.name: heading_tag
children.label: Heading tag
children.help_text: Choose a heading level. H1 is the largest, followed by H2, and so on.

children.name: display_for_each_result
choices: Display an image preview for each result
Display the category for each result

name: pagination
label: Pagination
inline_help_text: Pagination helps users browse long lists of results by organizing them into pages.

children.name: search_results_article_description
children.label: Search result article description.
children.default: Some preview text from each page will be displayed here to help your visitors browse through the search results quickly and find the page they need.

children.name: no_results_message
children.label: No results message
children.default:
Sorry. There were no results for [[search_term]].

Try rewording your query, or browse through our site.

children.name: active
children.label: Active
children.help_text: Styles the numbered link matching the page that you're currently on.
